dc_description: A sunlit dirt or gravel road runs through a dense wooded area, forming a tunnel-like corridor of trees and foliage. A person stands near the right side of the path beside a loaded touring bicycle with bags attached. The person’s face is blurred. Dry leaves are scattered on the road, and a chain-link fence lines parts of the right side. A sign on the right reads in Italian: “PROPRIETÀ UNIVERSITÀ AGRARIA … ISOLA FARNESE.”
novel_visual_observations: The bicycle appears to be equipped for travel, with rear panniers and a rolled item strapped on top. The road narrows into a bright vanishing point in the distance under a canopy of arching trees.
location_name: Vicolo Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Roma
rich_context: Vicolo Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
